input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.6.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.6.2
            TITLE: driver template clearance criteria

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.6.2: Driver Template Clearance Criteria
IN.6.2 Driver Template Clearance Criteria 
To pass Mechanical Technical Inspection, the Driver Template must meet the clearance 
specified in F.5.6.3

final_answer: rule IN.6.2: Driver Template Clearance Criteria IN.6.2 Driver Template Clearance Criteria To pass Mechanical Technical Inspection, the Driver Template must meet the clearance specified in F.5.6.3
